title: Remote control
description: Let a phone/web client remotely take over this machine's session (tools still run locally). Once enabled, local conversations are mirrored to the phone, and the phone can drive the same session.
natsUrlHint: For local testing use <0>nats://localhost:4222</0>; later use the address of the online relay server.
note: Note: remote control requires the desktop (GUI + agent) to be online and awake — this is an inherent prerequisite, not a cloud failure.
